name: Ingrid Marquis
bio: Anisa spent most of her childhood in Denver, Colorado, but went to high school in the Philippines where she was an international student herself! This is where Anisa fell in love with travel, trying new foods, and learning about different countries and cultures. During college, Anisa spent time with international friends and even had roommates from Turkey, Bolivia, and Spain. Now she works for Global Friends and loves it! Some of her hobbies include painting, going on walks, playing card games and hanging out with friends.
